hero.title: Step into Heritage
hero.subtitle: Kampung Kemasan
hero.tagline: Where History Lives in Every Corner

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Capturing the Essence of Kampung Kemasan
gallery.description: From grand architecture to everyday life, explore a curated collection of photos celebrating the beauty and cultural heritage of Kampung Kemasan.

features.architecture_desc: Famous for grand houses built by wealthy merchants. A fusion of Dutch structures, Chinese carvings, and Javanese spatial concepts.
features.history_desc: Flourished as a settlement for successful traders when Gresik was a primary international trading hub during the Dutch era.
features.photography_desc: Vibrant green and turquoise façades with symmetrical windows provide the perfect backdrop for cultural photography.

narrative.title: More than just old buildings, a living legacy.
narrative.description: Located in East Java, Kampung Kemasan is a cultural treasure reflecting centuries of trade and tradition. Walking through the streets is like stepping back in time.

about.intro_text: A neighborhood historically tied to the gold merchants of Gresik, blending wealth with timeless architecture.
about.quote: Unlike many historical districts lost to modernization, Kampung Kemasan survived thanks to community awareness and preservation efforts.
about.history_detail: In the late 1800s, successful traders built luxurious residences here, reflecting their status through a mix of Dutch colonial techniques, Chinese Peranakan details, and Javanese craftsmanship.
about.vision_desc: To preserve Kampung Kemasan as a symbol of multicultural harmony and historical pride in Gresik.
about.harmony_desc: Peaceful coexistence between Javanese communities, Chinese Peranakan merchants, and Dutch colonial influences.
about.action_desc: Local government and activists work to restore damaged façades and maintain original design elements.

events.title: Annual Events
events.subtitle: Celebrating Heritage, Trade, and Art
events.mtn_desc: Initiated by the Ministry of Culture, this program turns Kampung Kemasan into a creative laboratory for young artists to explore coastal narratives.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Collaboration & Inquiry
contact.success_desc: Thank you. We will respond to your inquiry within 24 hours.

footer.description: Dedicated to the preservation of cultural archives and the majesty of Nusantara architecture. Nurturing memory, building the future.
footer.copyright: All rights reserved. Crafted with pride.
